changes.title: Full CalDAV Two-Way Sync
changes.description: CalDAV calendars now support two-way synchronization. Create, edit, and delete events directly in Obsidian.

changes.title: Mobile Improvements
changes.description: Workspaces and Monthly View are now fully supported on mobile devices with an improved UI.

changes.title: Rich Read-Only Modal
changes.description: The event viewer for read-only events now displays full details including descriptions and attendees.

changes.title: ICS Parsing Hardening
changes.description: Robust parsing for Outlook/Exchange timezones, better date validation, and crash prevention for invalid ICS feeds.

changes.title: Google Calendar Credentials Menu
changes.description: Fixed an issue where the Google Calendar settings menu for credentials was not displaying correctly.

changes.title: Obsidian Bases provider
changes.description: Add [Bases](https://obsidian-full-calendar-remastered.github.io/plugin-full-calendar/user/calendars/bases/) as a calendar source (BETA).

changes.title: Provider initialization and cache resync
changes.description: Providers invoke initialize() after creation, load events into the cache with onAllComplete callbacks, adjust load priorities, and refresh event sources without full re-render when resyncing. (#173)

changes.title: ChronoAnalyser data integrity
changes.description: [ChronoAnalyser](https://obsidian-full-calendar-remastered.github.io/plugin-full-calendar/user/chrono_analyser/introduction/) now pulls from the main EventStore and parses category/project/subproject hierarchies correctly for accurate analysis.

changes.title: CalDAV validation and parsing
changes.description: [CalDAVProvider](https://obsidian-full-calendar-remastered.github.io/plugin-full-calendar/user/calendars/caldav/) now validates calendar collections with PROPFIND, parses calendar-data via DOMParser, adds JSDOM-backed tests, and surfaces clearer errors when URLs are invalid. (#193)

changes.title: Google OAuth and recurring timezone handling
changes.description: Mobile OAuth opens windows synchronously to avoid popup blockers (#191); recurring Google events honor exdates and BYDAY across timezones, correctly hiding deleted instances and preserving durations. (#190, #94)

changes.title: Tasks Provider Rearchitected for Performance and Precision
changes.description: The [Tasks provider](https://obsidian-full-calendar-remastered.github.io/plugin-full-calendar/user/calendars/tasks-plugin-integration/) now uses the official Tasks plugin's live cache for instant updates and performs surgical edits to preserve user metadata like links and tags. (#151, #155)

changes.title: Robust and Stable Settings UI
changes.description: The settings panel has been refactored for stability, with a more reliable color picker and a consistent layout for all calendar sources. (#141)

changes.title: Provider-Specific Task Completion
changes.description: Calendar providers can now implement their own custom logic for completing tasks, allowing for more flexible integrations. (#143, #144)

changes.title: ICS Timezone Fallback
changes.description: Remote ICS calendars with unrecognized timezones will now safely fall back to UTC instead of failing to load. (#91)

changes.title: Deep Tasks Integration with Backlog & Filtering
changes.description: First-class support for Obsidian Tasks, including a task backlog, drag-and-drop scheduling, and full CUD (Create, Update, Delete) operations directly within the calendar.

changes.title: Advanced Date Navigation
changes.description: New "Go To" dropdown in the toolbar with a date picker and context-aware navigation. Right-click to jump to specific dates, weeks, or months.

changes.title: Notification and Reminder Reliability
changes.description: End-time reminders now fire correctly for events that are already in progress.

changes.title: Core Component Stability
changes.description: Fixed bugs related to the event creation modal, Daily Notes calendar, and new calendar creation in settings.

changes.title: Multi-day Daily Note events
changes.description: Daily Note provider now supports explicit multi-day events via an [endDate:: YYYY-MM-DD] inline field with fallback to legacy overnight detection.

changes.title: Status bar current/upcoming events
changes.description: Lightweight status bar module displays current and next events by subscribing to TimeEngine.

changes.title: Interactive time-axis zoom
changes.description: Ctrl/Cmd + scroll to zoom time axis in timeGrid and resourceTimeline views for rapid focus changes (#96).

changes.title: Interval & positional recurrence rules
changes.description: Adds interval repeats (e.g., every 2 weeks) and positional monthly rules (2nd Tuesday, last Friday) with iCal interoperability (#97).

changes.title: Codebase compliance & safety
changes.description: Removed loose any casts, migrated inline styles to CSS, added instanceof guards, and simplified unload lifecycle.

changes.title: Reactive calendar view lifecycle
changes.description: view-config-changed triggers cache repopulate; new resync event prompts focused re-render for instant settings feedback.

changes.title: NotificationManager refactor
changes.description: Converted to passive subscriber of TimeEngine instead of maintaining its own internal interval.

changes.title: Timezone conversion for cross-day events
changes.description: convertEvent rewritten as a pure function handling explicit endDate and legacy overnight cases with stricter type guards.

changes.title: Event reminder system with desktop notifications
changes.description: New notification manager provides native desktop notifications for upcoming events. Get reminded 10 minutes before an event starts and optionally before it ends.

changes.title: Multi-account Google Calendar integration
changes.description: Connect and manage multiple Google accounts with a dedicated account management hub. Streamlined two-step wizard for adding calendars from any connected account.

changes.title: Provider-based architecture with multi-account support
changes.description: Complete overhaul from Instance-based to a provider-based architecture enabling stateful features and multi-account supports. Each calendar source is now self-contained with improved isolation and performance.

changes.title: Event-driven settings with instant updates
changes.description: Settings now use publish/subscribe model with granular events (sources-changed, view-config-changed). Calendar re-renders instantly without flicker or unnecessary reloads.

changes.title: Lazy-loading for faster startup
changes.description: Heavy dependencies like FullCalendar engine and React modals are now dynamically imported only when needed, dramatically improving startup time and memory usage.

changes.title: Centralized event enhancement pipeline
changes.description: New EventEnhancer module centralizes timezone conversions and category parsing, with dedicated WorkspaceManager for filtering and display logic.

changes.title: Timezone handling for recurring events
changes.description: Recurring events now properly handle timezones with endDate support, resolving timezone branching issues.

changes.title: ICS remote events loading fix
changes.description: Remove ICS events should now load properly.

changes.title: Calendar Workspaces
changes.description: Save and switch between customized calendar setups (sources, filters, and view). Includes a header switcher, command palette action, and optional default workspace.

changes.title: Faster switching and rendering
changes.description: Workspace changes apply incrementally to sources, filters, and current view, reducing re-renders and improving performance in large calendars.

changes.title: Edit modal subcategory parsing
changes.description: Fixes an issue where sub-categories could disappear when editing from the modal for certain titles.

changes.title: Business Hours and Background Events
changes.description: Highlight working hours in calendar views and display background events like vacations or focus blocks. Fully configurable in settings and event frontmatter.

changes.title: Timeline View: Shadow Events
changes.description: Optional display of category shadow events in Timeline View for better context and planning.

changes.title: Sub-category editing in event modal
changes.description: Event modal now shows and allows editing of sub-categories directly in the title field.

changes.title: Settings UI reorganization
changes.description: Settings modal has been reorganized for clarity, with added tooltips and a footer for version/help links.

changes.title: Recurring task timing preserved on undo
changes.description: Fixes a bug where child events lost their timing when undoing completed recurring tasks.

changes.title: All-day recurring events behave correctly
changes.description: All-day events are now treated as floating in recurrence rules, avoiding unwanted time shifts.

changes.title: Google Calendar integration with two-way sync
changes.description: Connect your Google account to create, modify, and delete single or recurring events directly in Obsidian, with full OAuth 2.0 authentication and calendar selection.

changes.title: Unified and reusable form components
changes.description: Inputs like URL, Username, Password, and Directory Select are now standardized with a read-only mode for consistent display, and a generic TextInput replaces one-off components.

changes.title: Refined settings UI and changelog view
changes.description: Settings are modularized into clearer sections with improved type safety, and a new changelog component has been added for update visibility.

changes.title: Better event parsing and caching pipeline
changes.description: Calendar parsers now use a unified enhancement pipeline, and event caching is more reliable with modularized update managers.

changes.title: Daily Note Calendar parsing and cache updates
changes.description: Fixed issues with daily note parsing and improved cache updates to correctly reflect changes when frontmatter is updated.

changes.title: Advanced categorization with hierarchical timeline view
changes.description: Events can now be organized by categories and sub-categories in a new resource timeline view. Expandable groups and aggregated parent rows make it easier to manage complex schedules.

changes.title: License update
changes.description: The plugin license has been updated to GPLv3 to comply with FullCalendar requirements.

changes.title: Cleaner UI and initial view options
changes.description: The event modal and settings UI have been polished with dropdown options and a new initial view setting that supports the timeline view.

changes.title: Smarter event titles and filenames
changes.description: Events now display clearer titles (e.g., "SubCategory - Event Name") while keeping filenames and internal data consistent.

changes.title: Monthly and yearly recurring events
changes.description: You can now create events that repeat every month or every year — perfect for anniversaries, billing cycles, or annual planning.

changes.title: Repeats dropdown in event modal
changes.description: Replaced the old recurring checkbox with a dropdown menu for choosing none, weekly, monthly, or yearly recurrence, with context-aware controls.

changes.title: Descriptive filenames for recurring notes
changes.description: Recurring events now generate clean, readable filenames like "(Every month on the 15th) My Event.md".

changes.title: Improved timezone and all-day support
changes.description: Timezone handling for recurring events has been refined, and all-day recurring events now display correctly.

changes.title: Right-click toggle for recurring tasks
changes.description: Recurring tasks can now be marked complete via right-click, just like one-time tasks.

changes.title: Smarter recurring events and tasks
changes.description: Recurring events can now be edited per-instance — drag, resize, or complete a task without affecting the whole series. Changes are reversible and tracked cleanly.

changes.title: Safe deletion with confirmation options
changes.description: Deleting a recurring event now asks whether to remove just one instance, the entire series, or promote existing edits to standalone events.

changes.title: Better task behavior for repeating events
changes.description: Recurring tasks now behave just like regular ones — you can check them off individually, and they show up correctly in the calendar.

changes.title: Multiday allday events fix by @yalikebaz
changes.description: Multiday allday events made inclusive for local calenders. Thanks to @yalikebaz for the fix!

changes.title: Performance and architecture improvements
changes.description: Refactored recurring event logic, improved performance on large calendars, and cleaned up the plugin architecture to prepare for future features.

changes.title: Insights engine has smarter dashboard with personas
changes.description: Adding persona (predefined rules like "Productivity", "Routine") to categories in insight config setting now cater to more powerful analysis.

changes.title: Insights panel and dashboard bugfixes
changes.description: Multiple bugfixes and UI adjustments focused on the insights panel.

changes.title: Insights engine in ChronoAnalyser
changes.description: New intelligent engine that can analyse your calender for past events and give you cool insights.

changes.title: Redesigned ChronoAnalyser UI/UX
changes.description: ChronoAnalyser now much more elegant. Check it using the `Analysis` button in the Full-Calendar window.

changes.title: Multiple bugfixes in ChronoAnalyser
changes.description: Make ChronoAnalyser more stable and reliable. Plotting and insights now work more reliably.

changes.title: Category coloring engine and settings UI
changes.description: A new optional setting, 'Enable Category Coloring,' allows you to color events based on a category defined in the event's title (e.g., 'Work - Project Meeting'). This overrides the default calendar color for fine-grained visual organization.

changes.title: Category-aware event modal
changes.description: The edit/create event modal now features a dedicated 'Category' input field. It provides intelligent autocomplete suggestions based on all your previously used categories, making categorization fast and consistent.

changes.title: Redesigned event modal UI/UX
changes.description: The edit/create event modal has been completely redesigned with a polished two-column layout, logical grouping of fields, and a dedicated footer for actions, improving clarity and ergonomics.

changes.title: Color palette enhancements
changes.description: Colors no longer defaults to black, but is now rotated from a carefully choosen palette.

changes.title: "Open note" workflow enhancement
changes.description: Clicking 'Open Note' in the modal now opens the note in a split view, improving calendar-note navigation.

changes.title: Robust timezone support
changes.description: Events from local and remote calendars are now fully timezone-aware, fixing bugs related to DST and travel.

changes.title: Strict timezone mode for daily notes
changes.description: A new setting allows users to anchor daily note events to a specific timezone, just like regular notes.

changes.title: Correctly parse UTC events from ICS feeds
changes.description: Fixed a critical bug where events specified in UTC from Google Calendar and other sources would appear at the wrong time.

changes.title: ChronoAnalyser released
changes.description: ChronoAnalyser can now analyse you time spending! Check the new `Analysis` button in the Full-Calendar window.

changes.title: Initial plugin release
changes.description: Welcome to the first version of the enhanced Full Calendar!
